subject: Your thermoforming inquiry — quick hello from Machinecraft
body:
Hi,

I hope this finds you well. I'm Rushabh from Machinecraft — we design and build thermoforming equipment in India and work with companies across Europe.

You'd been in touch with us about thermoforming, and I wanted to follow up. I'd be glad to understand what you're looking for — sheet size, depth, material, and whether it's for packaging, technical parts, or something else — so we can suggest the right fit (PF1, ATF, or lab) and ballpark lead times and pricing.

We have references in the Netherlands (near Den Haag — Dezet and Dutch Tides) where you can see our machines if that's useful. For France we're happy to share specs and a formal quote once we know your rough requirements.

No pressure — just a short note to pick up the thread. If a 15–20 minute call in the next couple of weeks works, reply with a couple of options and I'll match one.

Best,
Rushabh
